name: Chicken with Olives and Lemon Tajine
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a heat-proof casserole or Dutch oven.
2. Stir in the next seven ingredients: garlic, parsley, coriander, salt, black pepper, saffron, and lemon zest.
3. Add chicken pieces to the pot and turn them to coat with the onion mixture.
4. Arrange lemon wedges on top of the chicken.
5. Cover and simmer, turning occasionally, for 1 1/2 to 2 hours, or until the chicken is very tender.
6. Remove the chicken to a warm serving platter and arrange the cooked lemon wedges on top.
7. Reduce the liquid in the casserole over high heat until it thickens into a sauce.
8. Add the olives and heat through.
9. Pour the sauce over the chicken.
